contactSection.title: Do you have questions about MyHome24App?
contactSection.text: Our team is happy to help with questions about property listings, accounts, roles, contact requests or technical issues.
contactSection.cardText: Write to us directly or use the contact form. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
contactSection.responseHint: Usually answered within a short time.

contactText: Have questions, feedback or need help? Feel free to send us an email.

testimonials.title: What users say about MyHome24App
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from people who want to search, compare and publish properties more easily.

items.name: Anna Müller
items.text: Fantastic platform! I found my dream home in just a few days.

items.name: Paul Bauer
items.text: Very user-friendly and reliable. I can recommend MyHome24App to everyone.

items.name: Sara Schmidt
items.text: The search was fast, simple and very helpful. A really great experience.

testimonial1: I found my dream home through MyHome24App. Just amazing!
testimonial2: Fast, easy and reliable. Highly recommended!
testimonial3: The platform is super intuitive and I found many good offers.
